_README: Machine-readable mirror of preregistration.md (the human authority). The FROZEN Track-2 catalog->closet re-measure decision rule. If this and the .md ever disagree, the .md wins and the divergence is a bug. FROZEN 2026-07-20, before any friend label was looked at. All AUC values are fractions. The export certificate in fitted/scripts/exportTrack2Core.cjs (CERTIFICATE) mirrors export_certificate below and is pinned equal by tests/test_preregistration.py.
supersedes_gate: h26 reported-not-gated transfer band (CI_low(AUC_closet) >= 0.70 floor AND drop <= 0.12) — RETIRED as a gate; structurally undecidable (see derivation)

primary_read.name: accepted_vs_rejected_discrimination_within_user
primary_read.metric: pooled within-user AUC of the content prior's outfit score, accepted vs rejected
primary_read.ci_note: 97.5% two-sided percentile CI = Bonferroni split over 2 looks (family-wise alpha 0.05); percentiles 1.25 / 98.75

looks.trigger: first export with both arms >= 25 scoreable clusters AND concentration cap OK
first export with both arms >= 50 scoreable clusters AND cap OK

verdicts.ESTABLISHED: CI_low > 0.50 AND point >= 0.60 at Look 1 or Look 2 -> M6 re-measure entry SATISFIED; cohort-conditional
verdicts.NOT_ESTABLISHED_well_powered: Look 2 reached, CI straddles 0.50 or point < 0.60 -> M6 does not open on this basis
verdicts.NOT_ESTABLISHED_underpowered: horizon reached with 25 <= N < 50/arm and Look 1 did not establish
verdicts.UNDERPOWERED_TERMINAL: horizon reached with N < 25/arm -> cohort could not power the question

primary_read.no_optional_stopping: exactly two looks, alpha split Bonferroni, horizon-terminal; no third look, no boundary reinterpretation

retired_as_gate.trap_guard: the 0.70 floor's pass bar exceeds the catalog ceiling 0.7315 at every reachable N — structurally unpassable; see derivation

ground_truth_proxy.primary_label: human accept/reject on a stylist-generated outfit — a taste+compatibility BLEND
ground_truth_proxy.different_from_h26: NOT co-worn Polyvore truth; NOT pure compatibility
ground_truth_proxy.range_restriction_reframe: the stylist pre-filters for compatibility, so both arms are the high-compatibility tail (truncated range DEFLATES AUC toward 0.5). The primary therefore measures MARGINAL discrimination beyond the stylist's implicit filter — precisely the M6 production job (re-rank stylist candidates). Deflation makes ESTABLISHED conservative and can never manufacture a false ESTABLISHED.

export_certificate._note: MUST byte-equal fitted/scripts/exportTrack2Core.cjs CERTIFICATE; pinned by tests/test_preregistration.py

eligibility.labeled: latest-state action in {accepted, rejected} per §23-H61 (createdAt desc, _id tiebreak)
eligibility.primary_scoreable: pairwise-sized AND image-usable AND labeled; NOT filtered by same-category-negative availability
eligibility.transfer_scoreable: primary-scoreable AND accepted AND >=1 clothingType with >=2 items in the friend's closet
eligibility.lineage_dedup: scoreable counts dedup by item-set signature within {friend, arm}
eligibility.author_excluded: operator's own closet (Brian-as-friend-#0, known authId) excluded from the headline pool, reported separately

measurand.scorer_headline: H26 trained pairwise type-conditioned edge head — experiments/h26/selection.json checkpoint grid_0 (sha a172be27...), 795617 params, scored as H26 froze it
measurand.exif: ImageOps.exif_transpose before embedding (mandatory, §23-H53); orientation-6 regression fixture required
measurand.image_resolution_failure: outfit with any unresolved image is not scoreable (excluded, never partial-scored)
measurand.reference_rung_reported: zero-shot FashionSigLIP cosine, same embeddings (H26 deployable fallback)

statistics.primary_unit: snapshot, blocked within friend; the 3-5 friends are NOT resampled (cohort-conditional)
statistics.leave_one_friend_out: recompute dropping the largest-n friend; a flip across 0.50 downgrades ESTABLISHED -> suggestive (never the reverse)
statistics.per_friend_reporting: report every friend's arm counts + own AUC

derivation.method: Hanley-McNeil 1982 large-sample AUC SE, balanced n_pos=n_neg=N; 95% half-width = 1.96*SE

floor_unpassable.conclusion: pass bar exceeds ceiling at every reachable N

freeze_mechanics.freeze_binds_when: a friend accept/reject label (or any score over friend data) is first read/exported for analysis — NOT when a row is written
freeze_mechanics.yield_readout_never_scores: export_track2.mjs manifest.yield certifies sample eligibility+count only; never computes the compatibility score

yield_model.provenance: app design + H26 attrition + row-volume counts only; no label/action field read, no score computed
